narrative_votes: URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war, suggesting that it could spread to the entire world and involve many countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries for their handling of the COVID-19 vaccine distribution, implying that it has led to a lack of trust and cooperation among nations.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: बड़े इंटरनेशनल संगठन, जो आमतौर पर शांति की बात करते हैं, वे कमजोर हो जाएंगे.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text suggests that the Western-led international organizations will become weaker and less effective in maintaining peace and stability.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: टीसरा विश्व युद्ध जिद्ा छिडा तो दुनिया तीन टुकडों बंट जागी!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear of a potential third world war by stating that if the war escalates, the world could be divided into three parts, and many countries would be involved in the conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: क्या वाकि तीसरा जिद्ि जंग हो सकती है?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war, including the possibility of a third world war and the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: दुनिया में ताकत को लेकर बहुत बडा बदलाव हो सकता है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries and their diplomatic efforts, stating that they are responsible for the escalation of the conflict and the potential division of the world.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear and anxiety about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.
